title: PDcar (G63)
description: Adds modern real-world vehicles to Minecraft in a clean low-poly style with immersive driving.
body:
![Screenshot of a modern G-Class style SUV vehicle from the mod standing on grass in a Minecraft world.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7a37f7231a949156138eeb9b6b4595b93cba83c.png)

### PDcar

---

# 🚗 Modern Vehicles Mod

**Modern Vehicles Mod** adds realistic modern cars to Minecraft with detailed models, custom sounds, and interactive mechanics.
The mod is designed to bring modern transportation into the Minecraft world while keeping the gameplay simple and immersive.

Currently included vehicles:

• **G-Class SUV**

More vehicles will be added in future updates.

---

## ⚙️ Features

• Detailed modern vehicle models
• Smooth driving mechanics
• Custom vehicle sounds
• Vehicle damage system – cars take damage from crashes and impacts
• Fuel system – vehicles require fuel to operate
• Repair system to maintain your vehicle
• Vehicle storage system with an interactive trunk

---

## 🔧 Vehicle Mechanics

**Open Trunk**
Shift + Right Click the vehicle to open its **trunk storage**.

**Repairing**
Shift + Right Click the vehicle with an **Iron Ingot** to repair it.

**Refueling**
Right Click the vehicle with **Blaze Powder** to refuel it.

**Damage System**
Vehicles take damage from **collisions and strong impacts**, so drive carefully.

---

## 🚀 Future Plans

The mod will continue to expand with new content:

• More modern vehicles
• Additional mechanics and interactions
• Improved sounds and effects
• More customization options

---
